items.title: Early Weight-Bearing Speeds Recovery After Unstable Ankle Fracture Surgery: study
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that early weight-bearing and mobilization significantly speed recovery, improve functional outcomes, and progress rehabilitation after surgical fixation of unstable ankle fractures, without increasing complication rates.
items.curatedReason: 对于踝关节不稳骨折术后，早期负重可以显著加速恢复。这与传统延迟负重方案不同，支持你将早期负重和早期活动纳入踝关节不稳骨折术后康复方案，以优化患者功能预后。
items.titleZh: 早期负重可加速踝关节不稳骨折术后恢复
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，不稳固踝关节骨折手术内固定后，早期负重和活动显著加快恢复，改善功能结果，并促进康复进程，且不增加并发症发生率。
items.curatedReasonEn: For unstable ankle fractures after surgery, early weight-bearing can significantly accelerate recovery. This differs from traditional delayed weight-bearing protocols and supports your integration of early weight-bearing and mobilization into post-surgical rehabilitation for unstable ankle fractures to optimize patient functional outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究侧重于术后早期恢复，长期并发症和功能预后的详细比较可能需要更长的随访时间。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on early postoperative recovery; detailed comparisons of long-term complications and functional outcomes might require longer follow-up.

items.title: Pelvic floor muscle training for pelvic organ prolapse: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials | BMC Urology
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials confirms the efficacy and safety of pelvic floor muscle training for pelvic organ prolapse.
items.curatedReason: 盆底肌训练（PFMT）对盆腔器官脱垂（POP）有效且安全，其证据级别达到系统综述和荟萃分析。在临床实践中，你应该将 PFMT 作为 POP 患者的一线保守治疗方案，并能向患者明确其治疗获益。
items.titleZh: 盆底肌训练治疗盆腔器官脱垂：一项随机对照试验的系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析证实了盆底肌训练治疗盆腔器官脱垂的有效性和安全性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pelvic floor muscle training (PFMT) is effective and safe for pelvic organ prolapse (POP), with evidence reaching the level of systematic review and meta-analysis. In clinical practice, you should incorporate PFMT as a first-line conservative treatment for POP patients and clearly communicate its therapeutic benefits.
items.limitation: 尽管是系统综述，但不同研究中PFMT方案的强度、持续时间及患者依从性可能存在异质性。
items.limitationEn: Although a systematic review, heterogeneity may exist in the intensity, duration, and patient adherence of PFMT protocols across different studies.

items.title: APTA Report Finds Demand for Pelvic Health Physical Therapy Outpaces Access
items.summary: A new APTA report, "APTA State of Pelvic Health Physical Therapy," reveals that demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. currently outpaces access, identifying key challenges in workforce, awareness, and timely care.
items.curatedReason: APTA 报告指出，美国盆底物理治疗的需求远超供给。这意味着该领域市场潜力巨大，若你考虑专业发展或诊所扩张，盆底物理治疗无疑是一个值得抓住的增长点。不过，也要留意报告提及的劳动力、可及性和公众认知挑战，这会影响你把握市场机会的方式。
items.titleZh: APTA 报告：盆底物理治疗需求超出可及性
items.summaryZh: 美国物理治疗协会 (APTA) 的一份新报告《APTA 盆底物理治疗现状》显示，美国盆底物理治疗的需求目前超出了可及性，指出了劳动力、认知和及时护理方面的关键挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: The APTA report reveals that demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. significantly outpaces supply. This indicates immense market potential; if you're considering professional development or clinic expansion, pelvic health physical therapy is undeniably a growth area to seize. However, also pay attention to the workforce, access, and public awareness challenges mentioned in the report, as these will influence how you capitalize on market opportunities.

items.title: Effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia: a systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: This systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia.
items.curatedReason: 这项贝叶斯网络荟萃分析为卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍的非药物干预提供了高等级证据。在制定患者康复方案时，你应优先采纳其中证据级别高的干预措施，以最大化患者的恢复潜力。该分析有助于指导你做出更精准的临床决策。
items.titleZh: 卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍非药物干预的有效性：一项系统综述与贝叶斯网络荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析评估了卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍非药物干预的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Bayesian network meta-analysis provides high-level evidence for non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia. When developing rehabilitation plans, you should prioritize interventions with strong evidence to maximize patient recovery potential. This analysis can guide you in making more precise clinical decisions.
items.limitation: 贝叶斯网络荟萃分析的局限性在于纳入研究的异质性可能影响结果的稳健性。
items.limitationEn: A limitation of Bayesian network meta-analysis is that heterogeneity among included studies can affect the robustness of the results.

items.title: Prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury: a systematic review and meta-analysis for the female, woman and girl Athlete Injury pRevention (FAIR) consensus
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis identifies prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury in female, woman, and girl athletes as part of the FAIR consensus.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和荟萃分析总结了女性运动员上肢损伤的预防策略和可修改风险因素。你在指导女性运动员时，应参考这些证据来设计更具针对性的损伤预防方案，并关注女性特有的生理和生物力学因素。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员上肢损伤预防策略与可修改风险因素：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析作为 FAIR 共识的一部分，旨在确定女性运动员上肢损伤的预防策略和可修改风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis summarizes prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injuries in female athletes. When coaching female athletes, you should refer to this evidence to design more targeted injury prevention programs and pay attention to female-specific physiological and biomechanical factors.
items.limitation: 系统综述的局限在于纳入研究的异质性，可能导致证据等级和结论的适用范围受限。
items.limitationEn: A limitation of systematic reviews is the heterogeneity of included studies, which can restrict the applicability of evidence levels and conclusions.

items.title: The Impact of a Single Bout of Antagonist Stretching on Agonist Muscle Performance and Range of Motion: A Systematic review and Meta-analysis | Sports Medicine - Open
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the impact of a single bout of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion, addressing conflicting findings in current literature.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了拮抗肌单次牵伸对激动肌表现和关节活动范围的影响。在制定热身或拉伸方案时，你需要权衡拮抗肌牵伸对后续运动表现的潜在影响，尤其是需要爆发力的运动，确保平衡柔韧性与力量输出的需求。
items.titleZh: 拮抗肌单次牵伸对激动肌表现和关节活动范围的影响：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析调查了拮抗肌单次牵伸对激动肌表现和关节活动范围的影响，旨在解决当前文献中存在的冲突发现。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis suggests that a single bout of antagonist stretching might affect agonist muscle performance. When designing warm-up or stretching protocols, you need to carefully weigh the potential impact of antagonist stretching on subsequent explosive power, ensuring a balance between flexibility and power output.
items.limitation: 系统综述和荟萃分析可能存在纳入研究异质性，导致结果解释需谨慎，且对不同运动类型的影响可能不同。
items.limitationEn: Systematic reviews and meta-analyses may have heterogeneity among included studies, requiring cautious interpretation of results, and the impact on different sports types may vary.

items.title: Effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder: a randomized controlled trial | Bulletin of Faculty of Physical Therapy
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigated the effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder.
items.curatedReason: 疼痛神经科学教育（PNE）对肩周炎患者的疼痛、运动恐惧症、功能障碍和生活质量有显著改善。将 PNE 纳入肩周炎的综合治疗方案中，能增强患者的自我效能和症状管理能力。
items.titleZh: 疼痛神经科学教育对肩周炎患者疼痛、运动恐惧症、功能障碍和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验探讨了疼痛神经科学教育对肩周炎患者疼痛、运动恐惧症、功能障碍和生活质量的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pain Neuroscience Education (PNE) significantly improves pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder. Integrating PNE into a comprehensive treatment plan for frozen shoulder can enhance patient self-efficacy and symptom management.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心随机对照试验，其结果外推性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center randomized controlled trial, and the generalizability of its findings may be limited.

items.title: Effects of OsteoStrong vs. dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women in the BONEMORE randomized controlled trial | Aging Clinical and Experimental Research
items.summary: The BONEMORE randomized controlled trial compared the effects of OsteoStrong versus dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明 OsteoStrong 训练与多组分动态运动对老年女性身体功能改善相似。作为一种新兴的骨骼强化方案，OsteoStrong 为骨质疏松或肌少症风险患者提供了除传统运动外的另一种选择，但其长期效果和适用人群仍需更多研究支持。
items.titleZh: OsteoStrong 与多组分动态运动对老年女性身体功能影响的随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: BONEMORE 随机对照试验比较了 OsteoStrong 与多组分动态运动对老年女性身体功能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that OsteoStrong training offers similar improvements in physical function for older women compared to multicomponent dynamic exercise. As an emerging bone-strengthening program, OsteoStrong provides an alternative to traditional exercise for patients at risk of osteoporosis or sarcopenia, though its long-term effects and target population require further research.
items.limitation: 研究对象为老年女性，结果可能不适用于其他人群。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were older women, and the results may not be generalizable to other populations.

items.title: Biokinetic insights into the hip–spine relationship: no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain | European Spine Journal
items.summary: This biokinetic study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain, suggesting that these factors may not be directly linked to pelvic kinematics in this population.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现髋关节力量或柔韧性与腰痛患者骨盆运动改变无相关性，挑战了“髋脊联动”理论的某些方面。你在评估腰痛患者时，不应过度强调髋关节活动度与力量作为骨盆异常运动的预测指标。
items.titleZh: 髋脊联动：腰痛患者髋关节力量或柔韧性与骨盆运动改变无相关性
items.summaryZh: 这项生物动力学研究发现，腰痛患者的髋关节力量或柔韧性与骨盆运动改变之间没有相关性，表明这些因素可能与该人群的骨盆运动学没有直接联系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in low back pain patients, challenging certain aspects of the "hip-spine relationship" theory. When assessing low back pain patients, you should not overemphasize hip range of motion and strength as predictors of abnormal pelvic motion.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，不能建立因果关系，且研究人群特定，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study, which cannot establish causality, and the specific study population limits generalizability.

items.title: Mattress impact on lifestyle and back pain: a 25-year orthopedic literature review guideline | Journal of Orthopaedics and Traumatology
items.summary: This 25-year orthopedic literature review systematically evaluated the impact of mattress characteristics on sleep quality, low back pain, and spinal health, finding that inadequate bedding support can contribute to various discomforts upon awakening.
items.curatedReason: 这份 25 年的系统综述明确，床垫支撑不足会导致醒后不适。向患者提供改善睡眠质量和缓解腰痛的建议时，务必根据其中关于床垫硬度、材料和支撑的结论，指导他们选择合适的床垫，因为这直接关系到脊柱健康。
items.titleZh: 床垫对生活方式和背痛的影响：一项 25 年骨科文献综述指南
items.summaryZh: 这项为期 25 年的骨科文献综述系统评估了床垫特性对睡眠质量、腰痛和脊柱健康的影响，发现不充分的卧具支撑可能导致醒来时的各种不适。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 25-year systematic review clearly states that inadequate mattress support can lead to discomfort upon awakening. When advising patients on improving sleep quality and alleviating low back pain, you must guide them in selecting appropriate mattresses based on the conclusions regarding firmness, materials, and support, as this directly impacts spinal health.
items.limitation: 系统综述可能存在异质性，不同研究之间的床垫类型、评估方法和患者特征差异可能影响结果的综合解释。
items.limitationEn: Systematic reviews may have heterogeneity, where differences in mattress types, assessment methods, and patient characteristics across studies can affect the integrated interpretation of results.

items.title: Efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia: a randomized, single-blind, controlled trial | Neurological Sciences
items.summary: This randomized, single-blind, controlled trial demonstrated the efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明沉浸式 sEMG 触发的虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难有效且安全。你可以考虑将其作为传统吞咽康复的有效辅助手段，尤其对于需要强化生物反馈和增强患者依从性的患者。这一技术有望提升吞咽康复的参与度和效果。
items.titleZh: 沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的疗效与安全性：一项随机、单盲、对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机、单盲、对照试验证实了沉浸式 sEMG 触发的虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的有效性和安全性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that immersive sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training is effective and safe for post-stroke dysphagia. You might consider it as an effective adjunct to traditional dysphagia rehabilitation, especially for patients requiring enhanced biofeedback and improved adherence. This technology has the potential to boost engagement and outcomes in dysphagia rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究为单盲设计，可能存在安慰剂效应或研究者偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study used a single-blind design, which may introduce placebo effects or researcher bias.

items.title: Integrating serum neurotrophin profiles and quantitative EEG for predicting motor outcomes in acute ischemic stroke | BMC Neurology
items.summary: This research investigates whether integrating serum neurotrophin profiles with quantitative electroencephalography (qEEG) parameters enhances predictive accuracy for 6-month motor outcomes beyond conventional clinical factors in acute ischemic stroke.
items.curatedReason: 整合血清神经营养因子和定量脑电图（qEEG）可以提高急性缺血性卒中患者运动功能预后的预测准确性。这提示你在评估患者预后时，可以考虑结合多模态生物标志物，提供更全面的信息，从而优化康复方案的制定。
items.titleZh: 整合血清神经营养因子和定量脑电图预测急性缺血性卒中运动结局
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了整合血清神经营养因子谱和定量脑电图（qEEG）参数是否能提高急性缺血性卒中患者 6 个月运动结局的预测准确性，超越传统临床因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Integrating serum neurotrophin profiles and quantitative EEG (qEEG) can enhance the accuracy of predicting motor outcomes in acute ischemic stroke patients. This suggests that when assessing patient prognosis, you might consider combining multimodal biomarkers to provide more comprehensive information and optimize rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，可能存在未控制的混杂因素影响结果，且结果需要前瞻性大规模研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study, which may have uncontrolled confounding factors affecting the results, and the findings require validation in larger prospective studies.

items.title: Risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field: a methodological scoping review | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: This methodological scoping review identifies risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field, noting widespread injuries due to growth, maturation, and escalating training loads, as well as inconsistencies in definitions and measurement approaches.
items.curatedReason: 这份方法学范围综述总结了青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素。你在指导青少年运动员时，应整合这些因素来制定损伤预防策略，尤其要关注与生长、成熟和训练负荷相关的风险。
items.titleZh: 青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素：一项方法学范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项方法学范围综述确定了青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素，指出广泛的损伤是由于生长、成熟和训练负荷增加，以及定义和测量方法的不一致造成的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This methodological scoping review summarizes risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injuries in youth track and field athletes. When coaching youth athletes, you should integrate these factors to develop injury prevention strategies, with particular attention to risks associated with growth, maturation, and training loads.
items.limitation: 范围综述的局限在于其主要目的是识别文献，不进行质量评估或荟萃分析，故不能提供量化的效应大小。
items.limitationEn: A limitation of a scoping review is its primary purpose to identify literature, not to perform quality assessment or meta-analysis, thus it cannot provide quantified effect sizes.

items.title: Surgical repair of radial meniscus tears yields favorable healing rates: a systematic review | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: This systematic review reports on current surgical techniques, patient-reported outcome measures, and quantifies healing rates following repair of radial meniscus tears.
items.curatedReason: 对径向半月板撕裂的手术修复显示出良好的愈合率。在临床中，当你遇到这类撕裂时，可以自信地向患者推荐手术修复，并告知其预期的良好愈合效果。但仍需关注长期功能预后数据。
items.titleZh: 径向半月板撕裂的手术修复显示出良好的愈合率：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述报告了径向半月板撕裂的当前手术技术、患者报告结局测量结果，并量化了修复后的愈合率。
items.curatedReasonEn: Surgical repair of radial meniscus tears demonstrates favorable healing rates. In clinical practice, when encountering such tears, you can confidently recommend surgical repair to patients and inform them of the expected positive healing outcomes. However, long-term functional outcomes still warrant attention.
items.limitation: 系统综述可能存在异质性，且愈合率的定义和评估标准可能因研究而异，影响结果的统一性。
items.limitationEn: Systematic reviews may have heterogeneity, and the definition and assessment criteria for healing rates can vary across studies, affecting the consistency of results.

items.title: Pelvic Floor Knowledge and Dysfunctions in Female Athletes: Impact of Demographics, Sport Profile, and Physical Activity - International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: This study investigated the knowledge of pelvic floor health and the prevalence of pelvic floor dysfunctions (PFDs) in female athletes, identifying impacts of demographics, sport profile, and physical activity.
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示了女性运动员盆底知识不足及盆底功能障碍（PFDs）与运动类型、强度和人口学因素之间的关系。你在对女性运动员进行评估和运动方案设计时，应主动筛查 PFDs，并考虑将盆底健康教育纳入运动训练指导。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员盆底知识与功能障碍：人口统计学、运动特征和身体活动的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了女性运动员盆底健康知识和盆底功能障碍 (PFDs) 的患病率，并确定了人口统计学、运动特征和身体活动的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals inadequate pelvic floor knowledge and the relationship between pelvic floor dysfunctions (PFDs) and sports type, intensity, and demographic factors in female athletes. When assessing female athletes and designing exercise programs, you should proactively screen for PFDs and consider integrating pelvic floor health education into sports training guidance.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，无法确定因果关系，且数据依赖自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study's cross-sectional design prevents causal inference, and reliance on self-reported data may introduce recall bias.

items.title: Differences in Pelvic Floor Morphometry for Women with Persistent Pelvic Pain and Deep Infiltrating Endometriosis—A Cross-Sectional Study | International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: This cross-sectional study describes differences in pelvic floor morphometry for a large population of women with persistent pelvic pain and deep infiltrating endometriosis compared to those without pain.
items.curatedReason: 本研究发现慢性盆腔疼痛伴深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症女性的盆底形态学存在差异。你在评估这类患者时，应关注盆底结构的特异性改变，将其作为辅助诊断和制定个性化康复方案的参考依据。
items.titleZh: 慢性盆腔疼痛伴深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症女性盆底形态学差异的横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究描述了患有持续性盆腔疼痛和深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症的女性与无疼痛女性盆底形态学上的差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found differences in pelvic floor morphometry in women with persistent pelvic pain and deep infiltrating endometriosis. When evaluating such patients, you should pay attention to specific changes in pelvic floor structures as a reference for auxiliary diagnosis and developing personalized rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法建立盆底形态改变与疼痛的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This was a cross-sectional study, so it cannot establish a causal relationship between pelvic floor morphological changes and pain.

items.title: Clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices compared to traditional methods: a systematic review with limited meta-analysis | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: This systematic review with limited meta-analysis compared the clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices to traditional methods.
items.curatedReason: 该系统综述显示，3D 打印固定设备在临床和功能结果上与传统方法相似。你可以将 3D 打印技术作为传统石膏和支具的可行替代或补充方案，尤其是在追求定制化和提升患者舒适度时。
items.titleZh: 上肢 3D 打印固定设备与传统方法的临床和功能结果比较：系统综述与有限荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项包含有限荟萃分析的系统综述比较了上肢 3D 打印固定设备与传统方法的临床和功能结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review indicates that 3D-printed immobilization devices yield similar clinical and functional outcomes to traditional methods. You can consider 3D printing technology as a viable alternative or supplement to traditional casts and braces, especially when aiming for customization and improved patient comfort.
items.limitation: 该系统综述为“有限荟萃分析”，可能存在研究异质性，且长期效果和成本效益方面数据仍有待观察。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review includes a "limited meta-analysis," suggesting potential study heterogeneity, and long-term effects and cost-effectiveness data are still pending.

items.title: MRI-based evidence of rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and its correlation with disease duration in Parkinson’s disease | BMC Medical Imaging
items.summary: This research provides MRI-based evidence of rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and its correlation with disease duration in Parkinson’s disease, linking it to cerebrospinal fluid dynamics and glymphatic system function.
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示了帕金森病患者颈后小直肌肥大与病程相关，这可能为该疾病的进展提供新的影像学生物标志物。你在评估帕金森病患者时，除了运动症状，还应关注颈部肌肉的影像学变化，这可能有助于理解疾病的病理生理进展。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者颈后小直肌肥大与病程相关性的 MRI 证据
items.summaryZh: 这项研究提供了帕金森病患者颈后小直肌肥大及其与病程相关的 MRI 证据，并将其与脑脊液动力学和胶淋巴系统功能联系起来。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals a correlation between rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and disease duration in Parkinson's disease, potentially offering a new imaging biomarker for disease progression. When assessing Parkinson's patients, you should consider cervical muscle imaging changes in addition to motor symptoms, as this may aid in understanding pathophysiological progression.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法确定颈后小直肌肥大与帕金森病程的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This was a cross-sectional study, so it cannot establish a causal relationship between rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and the progression of Parkinson's disease.

items.title: Glucagon-like peptide-1 agonists in Parkinson's disease: a meta-analysis
items.summary: This meta-analysis systematically evaluates the efficacy and safety of glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists in Parkinson's disease, distinguishing between symptomatic relief and potential disease modification, given conflicting clinical trial results.
items.curatedReason: 关于 GLP-1 受体激动剂在帕金森病中的荟萃分析显示，其在临床试验中的疗效和安全性存在冲突结果。你在评估帕金森病患者的治疗时，需认识到 GLP-1 激动剂在运动症状缓解和疾病改善方面尚无定论，不应将其作为常规治疗推荐。
items.titleZh: 胰高血糖素样肽-1 激动剂在帕金森病中的应用：一项荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项荟萃分析系统评估了胰高血糖素样肽-1 受体激动剂在帕金森病中的疗效和安全性，鉴于临床试验结果存在冲突，区分了对症缓解和潜在疾病改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis of GLP-1 receptor agonists in Parkinson's disease shows conflicting results regarding their efficacy and safety in clinical trials. When evaluating treatments for Parkinson's patients, you should recognize that GLP-1 agonists have no conclusive benefit for motor symptom relief or disease modification and should not be recommended as routine treatment.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析的结果受限于纳入试验的质量和异质性，可能存在发表偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The meta-analysis results are limited by the quality and heterogeneity of included trials and may suffer from publication bias.

items.title: Neurorobotics for Neurorehabilitation: Clinical Applications and Future Research Direction
items.summary: This article explores the clinical applications and future research directions of neurorobotics for neurorehabilitation, highlighting its potential in improving rehabilitation outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 神经康复机器人技术前景广阔，但本综述更侧重技术方向，而非直接的临床实践改变。目前不宜将其过早作为常规康复方案，但你应该持续关注其进展，为未来实践转型做准备。
items.titleZh: 神经康复机器人技术：临床应用与未来研究方向
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了神经康复机器人的临床应用和未来研究方向，强调了其在改善康复结局方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: Neurorobotics technology holds significant promise, but this review focuses more on technological directions than immediate changes to clinical practice. It's premature to adopt these as routine rehabilitation protocols; however, you should monitor their progress to prepare for future practice shifts.
items.limitation: 该综述主要关注技术应用和研究方向，缺乏针对特定患者群体和康复结局的临床疗效数据。
items.limitationEn: This review primarily focuses on technological applications and research directions, lacking clinical efficacy data for specific patient populations and rehabilitation outcomes.

items.title: Rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors: a scoping review of current guideline recommendations | Neurological Sciences
items.summary: This scoping review summarizes current guideline recommendations for rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors, identifying common themes and gaps in existing guidance.
items.curatedReason: 该范围综述汇总了当前关于原发性脑肿瘤患者康复的指南建议。你在为这类患者制定康复计划时，可以参考这些指南，确保实践符合当前证据的最佳推荐。这有助于标准化和优化脑肿瘤患者的康复路径。
items.titleZh: 原发性脑肿瘤患者康复：当前指南建议的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述总结了当前针对原发性脑肿瘤患者康复的指南建议，并确定了现有指南中的共同主题和空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review summarizes current guideline recommendations for rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors. When developing rehabilitation plans for these patients, you can refer to these guidelines to ensure practices align with current best evidence. This helps standardize and optimize rehabilitation pathways for brain tumor patients.
items.limitation: 范围综述的局限在于它聚合了不同指南的建议，而非提供新的实证研究，且指南本身可能存在证据等级差异。
items.limitationEn: The limitation of a scoping review is that it synthesizes recommendations from various guidelines rather than providing new empirical research, and the guidelines themselves may vary in evidence levels.

items.title: Electromyography patterns during running in injured versus healthy runners: a systematic review | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders
items.summary: This systematic review investigates electromyography patterns during running in injured versus healthy runners, addressing the comparatively less focused role of muscle coordination in running injuries despite links to biomechanical factors.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述总结了受伤和健康跑步者的肌电图模式差异。你在评估跑步损伤患者时，应关注肌电图模式的改变，这有助于更精准地识别肌肉协调问题，并指导制定个性化的康复和训练方案。
items.titleZh: 受伤与健康跑步者跑步时的肌电图模式：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述调查了受伤和健康跑步者在跑步时的肌电图模式，尽管与生物力学因素相关，但对跑步损伤中肌肉协调作用的关注相对较少。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review summarizes differences in electromyography patterns between injured and healthy runners. When evaluating patients with running injuries, you should pay attention to changes in electromyography patterns, as this helps more accurately identify muscle coordination issues and guides the development of personalized rehabilitation and training programs.
items.limitation: 系统综述存在纳入研究异质性的风险，不同研究在肌电图采集方法、分析技术和跑步损伤类型上可能存在差异。
items.limitationEn: Systematic reviews carry the risk of heterogeneity among included studies, with potential differences in EMG acquisition methods, analysis techniques, and types of running injuries across studies.

items.title: Scapular dyskinesis with preserved structure and function in largely asymptomatic junior elite tennis players: a 2D video and multimodal cross-sectional study | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: This cross-sectional study found scapular dyskinesis with preserved structure and function in largely asymptomatic junior elite tennis players using 2D video and multimodal analysis.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现，即便功能和结构完好，青少年精英网球运动员也可能存在肩胛骨运动异常。你在评估这些运动员时，不应仅依赖症状和体征，而应结合影像学和运动分析，早期识别潜在的生物力学风险，以预防未来损伤。
items.titleZh: 青少年精英网球运动员无症状肩胛骨运动异常及其结构与功能保留：一项 2D 视频与多模态横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究使用二维视频和多模态分析，发现大部分无症状的青少年精英网球运动员存在肩胛骨运动障碍，但结构和功能得以保留。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that junior elite tennis players can exhibit scapular dyskinesis even with preserved structure and function. When assessing these athletes, you should not rely solely on symptoms and signs but integrate imaging and movement analysis to identify potential biomechanical risks early and prevent future injuries.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，不能建立肩胛骨运动异常与未来损伤之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This was a cross-sectional study, so it cannot establish a causal relationship between scapular dyskinesis and future injuries.

items.title: Melatonin promotes recovery from ischemic stroke by modulating microglia polarization and inhibiting oligodendrocyte pyroptosis via the RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 pathway | Journal of Translational Medicine
items.summary: This research investigates how melatonin affects white matter damage and oligodendrocyte pyroptosis after ischemic stroke by modulating microglia polarization through the RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 pathway.
items.curatedReason: 褪黑素在缺血性卒中后通过调节小胶质细胞极化和抑制少突胶质细胞焦亡来促进恢复。尽管这是一项基础研究，但它提示褪黑素未来可能作为辅助治疗策略，帮助减少卒中后的白质损伤。目前仍是机制探索阶段，不应直接用于临床。
items.titleZh: 褪黑素通过 RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 通路调节小胶质细胞极化和抑制少突胶质细胞焦亡促进缺血性卒中恢复
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了褪黑素如何通过 RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 通路调节小胶质细胞极化和抑制少突胶质细胞焦亡来影响缺血性卒中后的白质损伤和少突胶质细胞焦亡。
items.curatedReasonEn: Melatonin promotes recovery from ischemic stroke by modulating microglia polarization and inhibiting oligodendrocyte pyroptosis. Although this is a basic research study, it suggests melatonin may be a future adjunctive therapy to reduce white matter damage after stroke. Currently, it remains in the mechanistic exploration phase and should not be directly applied clinically.
items.limitation: 这是一项基础研究，主要探讨作用机制，其结果尚不能直接应用于临床实践，需要进一步的人体临床试验验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a basic research study focused on mechanisms; its findings cannot be directly applied clinically and require further human trials for validation.

items.title: Impact of Complicated Diabetes Mellitus in Patients Following Severe Traumatic Brain Injury | Neurocritical Care
items.summary: This original work investigates the impact of complicated diabetes mellitus in patients following severe traumatic brain injury, hypothesizing that post-TBI mortality is severity-dependent, driven by pre-existing diabetic complications rather than the diagnosis of DM alone.
items.curatedReason: 本研究强调了复杂性糖尿病对重度创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者预后的影响。你在评估 TBI 患者时，尤其是合并糖尿病者，应深入了解其糖尿病并发症情况，因为这可能比单纯的糖尿病诊断更能影响患者的死亡率和康复潜力。
items.titleZh: 复杂性糖尿病对重度创伤性脑损伤患者的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项原创研究调查了复杂性糖尿病对重度创伤性脑损伤患者的影响，假设 TBI 后的死亡率与严重程度相关，由既往糖尿病并发症而非单纯糖尿病诊断驱动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study highlights the impact of complicated diabetes mellitus on outcomes in patients with severe traumatic brain injury (TBI). When evaluating TBI patients, particularly those with diabetes, you should thoroughly understand their diabetic complications, as this may influence mortality and rehabilitation potential more than a simple diabetes diagnosis.
items.limitation: 研究为观察性研究，可能存在混杂因素，不能完全排除因果关系的倒置或遗漏。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study, which may have confounding factors and cannot completely rule out reverse causality or omissions.

items.title: A Physical Activity Clinical Practice Guideline for People With Moderate to Severe Traumatic Brain Injury
items.summary: APTA has released a new Clinical Practice Guideline for Physical Activity in People with Moderate to Severe Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.curatedReason: 这份针对中重度创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者的运动指南，是临床实践的重要依据。它将直接指导您为这类患者制定运动处方，填补了该领域系统化、基于证据的实践空白。
items.titleZh: 中重度创伤性脑损伤患者的身体活动临床实践指南
items.summaryZh: APTA 发布了针对中重度创伤性脑损伤患者的身体活动临床实践指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: This physical activity guideline for people with moderate to severe traumatic brain injury (TBI) is a crucial resource for clinical practice. It will directly guide your exercise prescription for these patients, addressing a gap in systematic, evidence-based practice in this area.

items.title: Composite severity score for race-related incidents in cycling
items.summary: This paper proposes an incident-level severity framework for surveillance in mass-start cycling sports, aiming to provide more insight into the relative severity of race incidents beyond traditional injury metrics.
items.curatedReason: 我们不能只盯着受伤数据不放。这个新框架能帮助我们量化自行车比赛中“事故”的严重性，而不仅仅是“损伤”，这为更全面的风险评估和预防策略提供了新思路。
items.titleZh: 自行车比赛中种族相关事件的综合严重程度评分
items.summaryZh: 本文提出了一项针对大规模起跑自行车比赛中事件严重程度的框架，旨在超越传统的损伤指标，为赛事事件的相对严重性提供更深入的见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: We need to look beyond just injury data. This new framework helps us quantify the severity of cycling race 'incidents'—not just 'injuries'—offering a novel perspective for more comprehensive risk assessment and prevention strategies.
items.limitation: 该框架是初步提案，其在实际大规模比赛中的验证和普遍适用性仍需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This framework is a preliminary proposal, and its validation and general applicability in actual large-scale races still require further research.

items.title: Ready to respond? Safeguarding structures in European National Olympic Committees
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of 20 European National Olympic Committees found that while most have safeguarding officers, there are widespread gaps in policies, reporting mechanisms, and case management for interpersonal violence, highlighting areas for improvement in organizational readiness.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对欧洲国家奥委会的调查揭示了运动安全保障结构中的普遍差距，这为你评估自身或合作机构的体育安全体系提供了参考，尤其是在预防人际暴力和完善响应机制方面。
items.titleZh: 准备好应对了吗？欧洲国家奥委会的保障结构
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 20 个欧洲国家奥委会的横断面调查发现，尽管多数已任命安全保障官员，但在应对人际暴力的政策、报告机制和案件管理方面普遍存在差距，凸显了组织准备方面的改进空间。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of European National Olympic Committees reveals common gaps in sports safeguarding structures. It provides a reference for evaluating your own or partner organizations' sports safety systems, especially in preventing interpersonal violence and improving response mechanisms.
items.limitation: 该研究为横断面调查，仅反映了特定时间点的现状，且依赖于受访者的自我报告，可能存在报告偏差。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey reflects the status at a specific point in time and relies on self-reported data from respondents, which may be subject to reporting bias.

items.title: Impact of heat exposure on muscle-tendon properties and mechanics (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: This PhD work investigated the responses of the neuromuscular and musculotendinous system in vivo under different heat stress conditions, focusing on the gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit, exploring effects of passive heat exposure, acute heat exposure during running, and active heat acclimation.
items.curatedReason: 这项博士研究提示，在高温环境下训练的运动员，其腓肠肌-肌腱单元的神经肌肉和力学响应可能发生改变。在制定训练计划或康复方案时，你需要考虑热应激对肌肉肌腱系统的潜在影响。
items.titleZh: 热暴露对肌肉-肌腱属性和力学的影响（博士学院奖）
items.summaryZh: 这项博士研究探讨了不同热应激条件下神经肌肉和肌腱系统在体内的响应，重点关注腓肠内侧肌-肌腱单元，研究了被动热暴露、跑步期间的急性热暴露以及主动热适应的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD work suggests that neuromuscular and mechanical responses of the gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit may change in athletes training in hot environments. When designing training or rehabilitation programs, you should consider the potential impact of heat stress on the musculotendinous system.
items.limitation: 研究集中在腓肠内侧肌-肌腱单元，其结果外推到其他肌肉群或整体运动表现时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study focused on the gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit, so caution is needed when extrapolating results to other muscle groups or overall athletic performance.

items.title: Correction: ACTIVATE: physical activity assessment, prescription and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals - a consensus study initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: This correction note indicates that Reference 57 has been updated in the ACTIVATE consensus study, which focuses on physical activity assessment and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals.
items.curatedReason: 这只是对之前一篇共识研究的勘误，提醒你如果之前引用或参考过该研究，需要留意其引用文摘已修正。
items.titleZh: 勘误：ACTIVATE：国际运动物理治疗师联合会发起的共识研究——医疗专业人员在临床实践中评估、处方和促进体育活动
items.summaryZh: 本勘误声明指出，之前发表的由国际运动物理治疗师联合会发起的 ACTIVATE 共识研究中，参考文献 57 已得到修正。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is merely a correction to a previous consensus study. If you previously cited or referred to that study, be aware that its reference abstract has been corrected.

items.title: Towards safer and smarter boxing: technology, health and performance
items.summary: This article discusses the need for technological advancements in professional boxing to improve athlete safety and performance, particularly concerning traumatic brain injury, moving beyond subjective judging and intuition-based training.
items.curatedReason: 本文探讨了如何利用技术改进拳击运动的健康和表现管理，特别是在创伤性脑损伤预防方面。你可以从中思考如何将这些前瞻性技术和数据驱动方法应用于其他高对抗性运动的康复和风险管理。
items.titleZh: 迈向更安全、更智能的拳击：技术、健康与表现
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了职业拳击运动在运动员安全和表现方面，需要通过技术进步来改善，特别是针对创伤性脑损伤的预防，以摆脱主观评判和基于直觉的训练。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article explores how technology can improve health and performance management in boxing, particularly in traumatic brain injury prevention. You can consider how to apply these forward-looking technologies and data-driven approaches to rehabilitation and risk management in other high-contact sports.
items.limitation: 文章主要为概念性探讨，尚未提出经过验证的具体技术解决方案或实施效果数据。
items.limitationEn: The article is primarily a conceptual exploration and has not yet presented verified specific technological solutions or implementation effectiveness data.

items.title: Correction: Body composition and physical fitness in transgender versus cisgender individuals: a systematic review with meta-analysis
items.summary: This correction note announces the removal of three studies from a published systematic review and meta-analysis comparing body composition and physical fitness in transgender versus cisgender individuals due to re-examination of eligibility criteria, while stating that the main conclusions and key messages remain unchanged.
items.curatedReason: 你如果曾引用或关注过这项关于跨性别者与顺性别者身体成分和体能差异的系统综述，需要注意其方法学已进行修正，尽管主要结论未变，但删除了三项不符合纳入标准的研究。
items.titleZh: 勘误：跨性别者与顺性别者身体成分和体能的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 本勘误声明指出，一篇关于跨性别者与顺性别者身体成分和体能差异的系统综述和荟萃分析，在发表后因方法学问题移除了三项研究，但主要结论和关键信息保持不变。
items.curatedReasonEn: If you cited or followed this systematic review on body composition and physical fitness in transgender versus cisgender individuals, note that methodological corrections have been made. While main conclusions are unchanged, three non-conforming studies were removed.

items.title: Follow up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on paediatric ACL injuries: towards a broader vision of care
items.summary: This editorial updates the 2018 IOC consensus on pediatric ACL injuries, incorporating new research on prevention, individualized management, evolving surgical strategies, and long-term holistic care, recognizing these injuries as a significant public health concern.
items.curatedReason: IOC 2018 年儿科 ACL 损伤共识声明的后续报告，整合了最新研究进展。这篇述评将帮助你更新对儿科 ACL 损伤预防、个体化管理和长期护理的认知，是你与患儿家庭及骨科医生沟通时的重要参考。
items.titleZh: 2018年IOC儿科ACL损伤共识声明的后续：迈向更广阔的护理愿景
items.summaryZh: 这篇述评更新了2018年国际奥委会关于儿科ACL损伤的共识声明，纳入了预防、个体化管理、手术策略演变和长期整体护理方面的新研究，并强调这些损伤是一个重要的公共卫生问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This follow-up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries integrates the latest research. This perspective will help you update your knowledge on pediatric ACL injury prevention, individualized management, and long-term care, serving as a crucial reference when communicating with patient families and orthopedic surgeons.

items.title: Multimodal Integration of Gait, Balance, and Infrared Thermography Enhances Machine-Learning Classification of Knee Osteoarthritis: A Cross-Sectional Study
items.summary: A cross-sectional study investigated whether combining gait, balance, and infrared thermography data improves machine-learning discrimination between individuals with knee osteoarthritis and healthy controls compared to single-domain models.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示，结合步态、平衡和红外热成像数据能提升机器学习模型对膝骨关节炎的分类准确性。你可以考虑在临床评估中整合多模态数据，以期获得更全面的诊断和干预依据，尤其是在需要精细鉴别诊断时。
items.titleZh: 步态、平衡和红外热成像的多模态整合增强膝骨关节炎的机器学习分类：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究旨在探讨步态、平衡和红外热成像的多模态整合是否能比单一领域模型更好地区分膝骨关节炎患者与健康对照组。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that combining gait, balance, and infrared thermography data can improve the accuracy of machine learning models for classifying knee osteoarthritis. You might consider integrating multimodal data into clinical assessments for a more comprehensive basis for diagnosis and intervention, especially when precise differential diagnosis is needed.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法评估这些模态在预测疾病进展或治疗效果方面的作用。
items.limitationEn: This study is a cross-sectional design and cannot assess the role of these modalities in predicting disease progression or treatment outcomes.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Mental health in tennis: a cross-organisational hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process
items.summary: A multi-method Delphi consensus process involving 83 participants from various tennis governing bodies generated recommendations for mental healthcare and wellness promotion among elite and junior tennis athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这份由 83 名专家通过 Delphi 共识制定的指南，为精英和青少年网球运动员的心理健康护理和促进提供了具体建议。如果你在网球领域工作，这份资源将直接指导你如何实施心理健康支持。
items.titleZh: 网球运动员心理健康：跨组织混合峰会-Delphi共识过程
items.summaryZh: 一项涉及网球七大管理机构83名参与者的多方法Delphi共识过程，为精英和青少年网球运动员的心理健康护理和健康促进制定了建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This guideline, developed through a Delphi consensus by 83 experts, offers specific recommendations for mental healthcare and wellness promotion among elite and junior tennis athletes. If you work in tennis, this resource will directly guide you on implementing mental health support.

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study of 8 physiotherapists found that treating children with cerebral palsy experiencing pain involves facilitating well-being, embracing bodily experiences for interpretation, creating alliances based on safety and respect, and balancing emotional/ethical engagement while acknowledging the limits of pain relief.
items.curatedReason: 本项定性研究勾勒了物理治疗师在处理脑瘫儿童疼痛时的临床思维和伦理挑战。它提醒你，疼痛管理不仅是技术活，更是深度理解和建立信任的过程。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是让生活更有意义。”一项关于物理治疗师治疗脑瘫儿童疼痛经验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对8名物理治疗师的定性研究发现，治疗脑瘫儿童的疼痛需要促进福祉、以身体体验为中心理解疼痛、建立基于安全与尊重的医患联盟，并平衡情感与伦理投入，同时承认并非总能完全缓解疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study outlines the clinical thinking and ethical challenges for physical therapists in managing pain in children with cerebral palsy. It reminds you that pain management is not just a technical task, but a process of deep understanding and building trust.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（8名物理治疗师），结果不具备广泛推论性。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (8 physiotherapists), so the findings are not broadly generalizable.

items.title: Building the foundations: organisational leadership for athlete mental health
items.summary: This editorial argues for proactive organizational leadership in athlete mental health, moving beyond reactive crisis responses to build preventive systems, as up to one-third of elite athletes report mental health symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 这份述评强调了组织领导在运动员心理健康管理中的关键作用。你应该意识到，仅仅响应危机是不够的，构建一个积极主动、预防性的心理健康支持系统至关重要。
items.titleZh: 奠定基础：运动员心理健康的组织领导力
items.summaryZh: 这篇述评呼吁运动员心理健康管理采取积极主动的组织领导力，超越被动危机响应，构建预防性支持系统，因为高达三分之一的精英运动员报告有心理健康症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: This perspective emphasizes the critical role of organizational leadership in athlete mental health management. You should recognize that merely reacting to crises is insufficient; building a proactive, preventive mental health support system is crucial.

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters
items.summary: This study aims to develop and validate a machine learning model using perioperative clinical parameters to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究旨在开发一个机器学习模型，利用心血管手术出院时的临床参数预测术后3个月的运动耐量受损情况。如果你在心肺康复领域工作，这个模型未来可能帮助你更早识别高风险患者，从而实现更精准的康复干预。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期运动不耐受性
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在开发和验证一个机器学习模型，通过围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后3个月的运动能力下降情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study aims to develop a machine learning model to predict impaired exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using clinical parameters available at hospital discharge. If you work in cardiopulmonary rehabilitation, this model could help you identify high-risk patients earlier, leading to more precise rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 这是一项预测模型开发研究，需要进一步的外部验证才能在临床中广泛应用。
items.limitationEn: This is a predictive model development study, requiring further external validation for broad clinical application.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: An mHealth intervention based on behavior change techniques to promote physical activity and nutrition in older patients with cancer: protocol for an N-of-1 trial
items.summary: This N-of-1 trial protocol describes an mHealth intervention for older cancer patients (≥70 years) using an ABA' design to improve physical activity and nutritional behaviors, combining ecological momentary assessment with accelerometry.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项针对老年癌症患者的mHealth行为干预协议，旨在促进身体活动和营养。你可以关注这类新兴的mHealth干预模式，它可能为你在老年患者，尤其是肿瘤康复领域，提供更灵活和个性化的支持工具。
items.titleZh: 基于行为改变技术促进老年癌症患者身体活动和营养的移动健康干预：一项N-of-1试验协议
items.summaryZh: 这项N-of-1试验协议描述了一项针对70岁及以上老年癌症患者的移动健康干预，采用ABA'设计，结合生态瞬时评估和加速度计，旨在改善其身体活动和营养行为。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a protocol for an mHealth behavioral intervention aimed at promoting physical activity and nutrition in older patients with cancer. You can pay attention to such emerging mHealth intervention models, which may offer more flexible and personalized support tools for your older patients, especially in oncology rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项N-of-1试验设计协议，主要用于个体化评估，结果不直接泛化，且目前仅为协议，尚未发布结果。
items.limitationEn: This is an N-of-1 trial design protocol, primarily for individualized assessment, results are not directly generalizable, and it is currently only a protocol, with no results yet published.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Cameroon involving 94 children with cerebral palsy found that only 38.3% accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and 38.3% showed good adherence (≥50% sessions completed).
items.curatedReason: 喀麦隆的这项研究突显了脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗的低比例（38.3%）。尽管背景在非洲，但这种差距提醒你要思考自己所在执业环境中，哪些社会经济因素可能影响患者的早期干预可及性与依从性。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗可及性与依从性：一项医院研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在喀麦隆对94名脑瘫儿童进行的横断面研究发现，仅有38.3%的儿童在5个月前早期接受了物理治疗，且只有38.3%的儿童依从性良好（完成≥50%的治疗计划）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study from Cameroon highlights the low proportion of children with cerebral palsy (38.3%) receiving early physiotherapy. While set in Africa, this gap should prompt you to consider what socioeconomic factors might impact early intervention accessibility and adherence in your own practice setting.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法确立因果关系；研究结果可能受限于喀麦隆的特定医疗系统和文化背景。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, which cannot establish causality; findings may be specific to Cameroon's healthcare system and cultural context.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: #Beyondthelikes: the influence of social media on athletes mental health
items.summary: This editorial discusses the dual impact of social media on adolescent athletes' mental health, highlighting both risks and opportunities, and suggesting future research and practical directions in digital contexts.
items.curatedReason: 当与青少年运动员及其家人讨论心理健康时，务必将社交媒体的潜在风险和机遇纳入考量。作为康复师，你应该帮助他们认识到数字世界的两面性，并引导他们建立健康的数字生活习惯。
items.titleZh: #Beyondthelikes：社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响
items.summaryZh: 这篇述评讨论了社交媒体对青少年运动员心理健康的双重影响，强调了数字环境中的风险与机遇，并提出了未来研究和实践方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: When discussing mental health with adolescent athletes and their families, you must consider both the potential risks and opportunities of social media. As a clinician, you should help them recognize the dual nature of the digital world and guide them toward healthy digital habits.

items.title: Infographic. Video analysis of muscle strains in sport: qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics across muscle groups
items.summary: This infographic details qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics of muscle strains in sport, derived from video analysis, providing insights into injury mechanisms to inform prevention and rehabilitation strategies.
items.curatedReason: 这份信息图通过视频分析，详细展示了运动中肌肉拉伤的定性和定量情境特征。它能帮你更深入理解肌肉损伤机制，从而优化你的预防和康复策略。
items.titleZh: 信息图：运动中肌肉拉伤的视频分析：跨肌肉群的定性和定量情境特征
items.summaryZh: 此信息图详细介绍了通过视频分析得出的运动中肌肉拉伤的定性和定量情境特征，为损伤机制提供了见解，以指导预防和康复策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: This infographic summarizes qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics of muscle strains in sport, studied via video analysis. It helps you better understand muscle injury mechanisms to optimize prevention and rehabilitation strategies.

items.title: Individual Prognostication of Emergence from Post-Traumatic Amnesia: A Nationwide Cohort Study
items.summary: A nationwide cohort study aims to predict individual emergence from post-traumatic amnesia in patients with moderate to severe traumatic brain injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项全国性队列研究致力于预测中重度创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者创伤后遗忘症（PTA）的个体化转归。理解并应用这些预测模型，可以帮助你更准确地与患者家属沟通预后，并为康复路径提供更个性化的规划依据。
items.titleZh: 创伤后遗忘症恢复的个体化预测：一项全国性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项全国性队列研究旨在预测中重度创伤性脑损伤患者从创伤后遗忘症中恢复的个体化进程。
items.curatedReasonEn: This nationwide cohort study aims to predict individual emergence from post-traumatic amnesia (PTA) in patients with moderate to severe traumatic brain injury (TBI). Understanding and applying these predictive models can help you more accurately communicate prognoses to patients' families and provide more personalized bases for rehabilitation pathway planning.
items.limitation: 本研究虽然是全国性队列，但预测模型仍需外部独立验证才能广泛应用于临床。
items.limitationEn: Although this is a nationwide cohort study, the predictive model still requires external independent validation for widespread clinical application.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) offers additional benefits over low-load exercise (LLE) and comparable benefits to high-load exercise (HLE) in muscle strength, disability, and pain for musculoskeletal conditions.
items.curatedReason: 在肌肉骨骼康复中，血流限制训练（LLE-BFR）在改善肌肉力量方面优于低负荷训练（LLE），且在减轻疼痛和改善功能障碍方面与高负荷训练（HLE）相当。这意味着对于不能进行高负荷训练的患者，LLE-BFR 是一个可行的替代方案。
items.titleZh: 血流限制训练在肌肉骨骼康复中是否比传统训练提供额外益处？一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，对于肌肉骨骼疾病，低负荷血流限制训练（LLE-BFR）在肌肉力量、残疾和疼痛方面比低负荷训练（LLE）有额外益处，且与高负荷训练（HLE）效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: For musculoskeletal rehabilitation, low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) is superior to low-load exercise (LLE) for improving muscle strength and comparable to high-load exercise (HLE) in reducing pain and disability. This means LLE-BFR is a viable alternative for patients unable to perform high-load training.
items.limitation: 部分研究的偏倚风险评估存在方法学缺陷。
items.limitationEn: Some studies had methodological flaws in their risk of bias assessment.

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: This RCT evaluated the agreement in diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions between physiotherapists and resident physicians compared with senior physicians as the reference standard in an emergency department for musculoskeletal complaints.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT研究支持了高级物理治疗师实践（APP）在急诊科诊断和治疗肌肉骨骼功能障碍的有效性。它提示你可以期待PT在急诊分流和管理中发挥更大的作用，这可能会改变你所在机构的PT执业范围。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼功能障碍诊断和治疗的一线共识。一项前瞻性、随机、对照研究
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验评估了物理治疗师和住院医师在急诊科处理肌肉骨骼疾病时，其诊断、治疗和出院决策与高级医师作为参考标准的一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT supports the effectiveness of Advanced Physiotherapy Practice (APP) in diagnosing and treating musculoskeletal dysfunctions in the emergency department. It suggests you can anticipate a greater role for PTs in ED triage and management, potentially altering PT scope of practice in your institution.
items.limitation: 研究是在单一急诊科进行的，结果可能无法完全推广到其他医疗环境。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted in a single emergency department, and the results may not be fully generalizable to other healthcare settings.

items.title: Effects of physical exercise on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis: A systematic review.
items.summary: This systematic review analyzed the effectiveness of different physical exercise interventions on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis, including randomized controlled trials.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述指出，物理锻炼可能对多发性硬化症患者的痉挛有积极影响，但具体效果尚不明确。在你评估非药物干预时，请注意当前证据的局限性，并根据患者具体情况进行个性化治疗。
items.titleZh: 体育锻炼对多发性硬化症患者痉挛的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述分析了不同体育锻炼干预措施对多发性硬化症患者痉挛的有效性，包括随机对照试验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review suggests that physical exercise may positively influence spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis, but the specific effects remain unclear. When evaluating non-pharmacological interventions, be mindful of current evidence limitations and personalize treatment based on individual patient circumstances.
items.limitation: 系统综述主要采用叙述性综合，没有进行荟萃分析，可能未能提供量化的效应大小。
items.limitationEn: The systematic review primarily used narrative synthesis without meta-analysis, which might not provide quantified effect sizes.

items.title: Quantifying Physical Activity Through Step Count Estimation Across Multiple Wearable Sensor Configurations: A Validation Study in Post-Stroke and Healthy Adults.
items.summary: This validation study identified the most accurate protocol for measuring stride-count in 18 post-stroke and 18 healthy individuals, comparing different wearable sensors, their placement, and data processing against a gold-standard instrumented treadmill.
items.curatedReason: 本验证研究对比了不同可穿戴传感器配置在卒中后患者和健康个体中测量步数的准确性。如果你在临床中依赖可穿戴设备追踪患者活动，务必关注传感器放置位置和数据处理方式对准确性的影响，以便选择最可靠的方案。
items.titleZh: 通过多种可穿戴传感器配置量化身体活动步数估算：一项针对卒中后和健康成人的验证研究
items.summaryZh: 这项验证研究比较了18名卒中后患者和18名健康成人，通过不同可穿戴传感器及其放置和数据处理，对抗金标准仪器化跑步机，以确定测量步数的最准确方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study validated the accuracy of various wearable sensor configurations for step count estimation in post-stroke and healthy adults. If you use wearables in clinical practice to track patient activity, this research can help you select more accurate solutions.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且仅评估了特定步行速度下的准确性，结果可能不适用于所有临床场景。
items.limitationEn: The study had a relatively small sample size and only evaluated accuracy at specific walking speeds, so the results may not be applicable to all clinical scenarios.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: This study developed a core set of 9 relevant patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy, grouped into 3 domains: functioning, well-being, and participation.
items.curatedReason: 本研究开发了儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（PRO）及其测量工具（PROM）集，适用于日常实践、研究和质量评估。这能帮助你在评估儿童患者时，标准化和优化结局指标的选择。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 这项研究开发了一套包含9个相关患者报告结局（PROs）及其对应测量工具（PROMs）的儿科物理治疗核心集，分为功能、幸福感和参与度3个领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed a core set of patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy, suitable for daily practice, research, and quality assessment. This can help you standardize and optimize outcome measure selection when evaluating pediatric patients.
items.limitation: 该核心集的开发过程基于专家共识和调查，未来需要进一步的实证验证。
items.limitationEn: The development process of this core set was based on expert consensus and surveys, and further empirical validation is needed.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: This difference-in-differences analysis of 62,217 Medicare beneficiaries in the US determined the effect of bundled payment for inpatient lower extremity joint replacement (LEJR) on prehabilitation delivery.
items.curatedReason: 这项对 62,217 名医疗保险受益人的分析显示，美国强制性打包支付模式对下肢关节置换术前康复（prehabilitation）的交付产生了影响。作为执业者，你应了解这类支付政策会如何塑造服务供给，并思考在政策约束下，如何维持或提升术前康复的质量和可及性。
items.titleZh: 强制性打包支付对下肢关节置换术前康复交付的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项针对美国62,217名Medicare受益人的双重差分分析，确定了住院下肢关节置换术（LEJR）的捆绑支付对术前康复交付的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This analysis of 62,217 Medicare beneficiaries indicates that mandatory bundled payment models in the US impact the delivery of prehabilitation for lower extremity joint replacement. As a practitioner, you should understand how such payment policies shape service provision and consider how to maintain or improve the quality and accessibility of prehabilitation under policy constraints.
items.limitation: 研究基于美国Medicare受益人的索赔数据，结果的普适性可能受限于该特定支付体系和人群。
items.limitationEn: The study is based on claims data from Medicare beneficiaries in the United States, and the generalizability of the results may be limited to this specific payment system and population.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement

items.title: Identifying Gaps in Rehabilitation Strategies for Chronic Stroke: A Systematic Review of Evidence in Patients With and Without Nerve Transfer.
items.summary: This systematic review aimed to compare upper limb rehabilitation strategies and outcomes in chronic stroke patients with versus without contralateral C7 nerve transfer and identify key evidence gaps.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述比较了慢性卒中患者上肢康复策略，尤其是神经转移术后与非神经转移术后的差异，并指出了康复剂量、内容和交付模式方面的证据空白。这有助于你理解现有康复方案的局限性。
items.titleZh: 识别慢性卒中康复策略的差距：对有无神经转移患者证据的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述旨在比较有无对侧C7神经转移的慢性卒中患者的上肢康复策略和结果，并识别关键证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review compares upper limb rehabilitation strategies for chronic stroke, particularly post-nerve transfer versus non-nerve transfer, clearly identifying evidence gaps in rehabilitation dosage, content, and delivery modes. In practice, this means our understanding of certain specific interventions remains insufficient, and clinical decisions require more prudence.
items.limitation: 由于研究目的为识别空白，而非评估效果，因此未对所纳入研究的质量进行深入评估。
items.limitationEn: As the study aimed to identify gaps rather than evaluate effectiveness, it did not deeply assess the quality of included studies.

items.title: Acute Modulation of Lumbar Motor Unit Behavior During Experimentally Induced Low Back Pain: A Motor Unit Decomposition Analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated the effects of experimentally induced acute low back pain on force steadiness and motor unit discharge characteristics during a spinal extension task in 33 healthy participants.
items.curatedReason: 这项实验研究揭示了急性腰痛会干扰运动单位放电特性和肌肉激活的时间组织，但其具体神经肌肉适应机制尚不完全明确。虽然是基础研究，但对理解腰痛的生理学机制有贡献。
items.titleZh: 实验诱导急性腰痛期间腰部运动单位行为的急性调节：一项运动单位分解分析
items.summaryZh: 这项研究在33名健康受试者中，通过实验诱导急性腰痛，探讨了其对脊柱伸展任务中力量稳定性和运动单位放电特征的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This experimental study reveals that acute low back pain disrupts motor unit discharge characteristics and temporal organization of muscle activation, though specific neuromuscular adaptations remain unclear. While foundational, it contributes to understanding the physiological mechanisms of low back pain.
items.limitation: 研究对象为健康受试者，通过实验诱导急性腰痛，结果的外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study used experimentally induced acute low back pain in healthy participants, limiting the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients assessed the prevalence, patterns, treatment effectiveness, and cost of physiotherapy for musculoskeletal disorders in a Nigerian University Teaching Hospital.
items.curatedReason: 这项来自尼日利亚的 10 年回顾性研究提示，当地物理治疗在肌肉骨骼疾病管理中是有效的，但其成本效益数据限于该地区，不宜直接推及其他国家或地区。在实践中，仍需结合本地医疗体系和患者群体特点来评估治疗方案。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病的流行率、模式、治疗结果和成本
items.summaryZh: 一项为期10年的回顾性研究评估了尼日利亚一所大学教学医院中1582名肌肉骨骼疾病患者的流行率、模式、物理治疗效果和成本。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year retrospective study from Nigeria suggests local physiotherapy is effective for musculoskeletal disorders. However, its cost-effectiveness data is region-specific and shouldn't be generalized. In practice, evaluate treatment plans by considering local healthcare systems and patient demographics.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心回顾性研究，数据可能存在选择偏倚，且结果主要适用于尼日利亚的特定医疗环境。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-center retrospective study, which may have selection bias, and the results are primarily applicable to the specific healthcare context in Nigeria.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study of 605 individuals with newly diagnosed SCI described the distribution and risk factors for sexual dysfunction during primary rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了脊髓损伤患者初次康复期间性功能障碍的详细流行病学数据和风险因素分析。了解这些数据有助于你在康复计划中更全面地考虑患者的性健康需求。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤初次康复期间的性功能：一项基于人群队列的描述性分析
items.summaryZh: 这项针对605名新诊断脊髓损伤患者的横断面研究，描述了初次康复期间性功能障碍的分布及其风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides detailed epidemiological data and risk factor analysis of sexual dysfunction during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury. Understanding this data will help you more comprehensively consider patients' sexual health needs in rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面分析，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This study is a cross-sectional analysis, making it unable to establish causal relationships.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort

items.title: Telerehabilitation during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors: A scoping review.
items.summary: This scoping review identified and mapped intervention models, outcome domains, and evidence gaps of telerehabilitation studies initiated during the hospital-to-home transition after a stroke.
items.curatedReason: 本范围综述绘制了卒中患者从医院到家庭过渡期间远程康复的干预模式和结局领域，并指出了证据空白。在设计远程康复方案时，请注意该领域仍在发展，现有模式可能存在局限性，需进一步研究以优化效果。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者从医院到家庭过渡期间的远程康复：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述旨在识别和绘制卒中患者从医院到家庭过渡期间远程康复研究的干预模式、结局领域和证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review maps telerehabilitation intervention models and outcome domains for stroke patients transitioning from hospital to home, highlighting evidence gaps. When designing telerehabilitation programs, note that this field is still evolving, and current models may have limitations, requiring further research for optimization.
items.limitation: 范围综述侧重于识别和映射现有证据，而非系统评估干预措施的有效性或质量。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews focus on identifying and mapping existing evidence, not systematically evaluating the effectiveness or quality of interventions.

items.title: Incomplete Cognitive Assessment in Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation: Recovering Clinically Interpretable Relationships from Routine Neuropsychological Data.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study of 2654 patients aimed to determine if incomplete routine post-stroke cognitive assessments can yield clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables.
items.curatedReason: 这项对 2654 名患者的回顾性队列研究提示，即使卒中后认知评估数据不完整，仍能从中挖掘出有临床意义的关系。这意味着我们不应因数据不完善而轻易放弃对患者认知状态的评估和解读，但仍需谨慎对待推论，并尽可能完善评估手段。
items.titleZh: 急性期后卒中康复中不完全的认知评估：从常规神经心理学数据中恢复临床可解释的关系
items.summaryZh: 这项针对2654名患者的回顾性队列研究旨在确定卒中后不完整的常规认知评估是否仍能产生认知、临床和情境变量之间具有临床可解释的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study of 2654 patients suggests that even with incomplete post-stroke cognitive assessment data, clinically meaningful relationships can still be derived. This implies we shouldn't dismiss evaluating and interpreting patient cognitive status due to imperfect data, but caution is warranted, and assessment methods should be improved whenever possible.
items.limitation: 研究是回顾性的，存在数据收集偏倚和选择偏倚的风险。
items.limitationEn: The study is retrospective, carrying risks of data collection and selection biases.

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: This exploratory observational study examined pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention when delivering instructions and feedback during telehealth for children with neurodevelopmental disorders.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性观察研究表明，儿科物理治疗师在远程医疗中运用了不同的“关注焦点”（FOA）指令和反馈策略。这意味着优化远程干预的教学效果，需要我们根据儿童的神经发育特点和具体治疗目标，有意识地选择和调整 FOA 策略。
items.titleZh: 远程医疗物理治疗中关注焦点在指导和反馈中的应用：一项观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项探索性观察研究考察了儿科物理治疗师在为患有神经发育障碍的儿童提供远程医疗时，如何在指导和反馈中运用关注焦点。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory observational study indicates that pediatric physical therapists use various 'focus of attention' (FOA) instructions and feedback strategies in telehealth. Optimizing the instructional effectiveness of remote interventions requires us to consciously select and adjust FOA strategies based on children's neurodevelopmental characteristics and specific treatment goals.
items.limitation: 研究样本量小，且为探索性观察研究，其发现的普适性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size and was an exploratory observational study, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: This assessor-blinded RCT found that an 8-week, twice-weekly, physiotherapist-led exercise group telerehabilitation (TeleCaRe) for adult cancer survivors was safe but not superior to a single in-person assessment and advice session for improving health-related quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，基于运动的癌症远程康复在改善癌症幸存者生活质量方面并不优于一次性的面对面评估和建议，但它是安全的。在资源受限或地理不便的情况下，你可以将远程康复作为安全的替代方案，但对期望值需要管理。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但在改善生活质量方面并不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机试验
items.summaryZh: 这项评估者盲法随机对照试验发现，为期8周、每周两次、由物理治疗师主导的成人癌症幸存者运动团体远程康复（TeleCaRe）是安全的，但在改善健康相关生活质量方面并不优于单次面对面评估和建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT shows that exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single in-person assessment and advice session for improving quality of life in cancer survivors. In resource-limited or geographically inconvenient settings, you can use telerehabilitation as a safe alternative, but expectations need to be managed.
items.limitation: 研究的对照组干预强度较低（仅一次性评估和建议），可能限制了远程康复相较于其的优势。
items.limitationEn: The control group intervention had low intensity (only a single assessment and advice session), which might limit the observed superiority of telerehabilitation.

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: This case report describes the clinical course of a 12-year-old female karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability, where figure-of-eight taping effectively facilitated exercise therapy.
items.curatedReason: 本病例报告展示了八字形贴扎与康复训练结合，如何帮助一名多向肩关节不稳的空手道运动员更好地进行运动疗法。对于复杂病例，你可以借鉴这种辅助技术，促进患者的主动训练。
items.titleZh: 八字形贴扎联合康复治疗学龄期女性空手道运动员多向肩关节不稳：一例病例报告
items.summaryZh: 本病例报告描述了一名12岁女性空手道运动员多向肩关节不稳的临床过程，八字形贴扎有效促进了其运动疗法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report illustrates how figure-of-eight taping combined with rehabilitation can help a karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability engage more effectively in exercise therapy. For complex cases, consider this auxiliary technique to facilitate active training.
items.limitation: 本研究为单一病例报告，其结果不具备普遍性，无法推广到其他患者群体。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report, and its findings are not generalizable to other patient populations.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 140 TIA/mild stroke patients found that a 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program significantly improved 6-minute walk test distance by 30 meters (p < 0.05) and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity over 6 months compared to usual care.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，综合心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）和轻度卒中患者的功能运动能力、身体活动和生活质量具有积极影响。下次评估这类患者时，应积极考虑将其转诊至心血管康复项目。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项对 140 名短暂性脑缺血发作/轻度卒中患者进行的随机对照试验发现，与常规护理相比，为期 6 周的心血管康复项目在 6 个月内显著改善了 6 分钟步行测试距离（30 米，p < 0.05）和中高强度身体活动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial demonstrates that integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation positively impacts functional exercise capacity, physical activity, and quality of life in patients with transient ischemic attack (TIA) and mild stroke. When next assessing such patients, you should actively consider referring them to cardiovascular rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 研究排除了严重卒中患者，结果不适用于更严重的病例。
items.limitationEn: The study excluded patients with severe stroke, so results are not applicable to more severe cases.

items.title: Prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of studies from PubMed/MEDLINE, Scopus, Web of Science, and SportDiscus estimated the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes across training levels and assessment methods, identifying associated moderators.
items.curatedReason: 在评估和管理运动员健康时，请高度重视进食障碍和饮食失调的患病率，它在不同训练水平和评估方法下存在差异。这项系统综述提供了关于这些问题的权威数据，并识别了相关调节因素，指导你进行更精准的筛查和干预。
items.titleZh: 运动员进食障碍和饮食失调患病率：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项通过 PubMed/MEDLINE、Scopus、Web of Science 和 SportDiscus 数据库进行的系统综述和荟萃分析，评估了运动员在不同训练水平和评估方法下进食障碍和饮食失调的患病率，并识别了相关调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis comprehensively assessed the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes, and identified related moderators. This is authoritative evidence for understanding prevalence across different training levels and assessment methods, which you should highly prioritize in athlete health assessment and management.
items.limitation: 不同研究使用的评估方法存在异质性，可能影响结果的综合性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity in assessment methods across studies may affect the generalizability of results.

items.title: Subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking in inpatient stroke rehabilitation: a multicentre cohort study.
items.summary: A multicenter retrospective cohort study of 565 stroke patients determined subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking on discharge after inpatient rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 在预测住院卒中康复患者出院时是否能独立行走方面，请使用伯格平衡量表（BBS）的亚型特异性截断值。对于缺血性和出血性卒中患者，其最佳预测分数不同，这能帮助你更精确地评估预后和设定康复目标。
items.titleZh: 住院卒中康复中伯格平衡量表预测独立行走的亚型特异性最佳截断值：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 565 名卒中患者进行的多中心回顾性队列研究确定了伯格平衡量表（BBS）在住院康复后预测独立行走方面的亚型特异性最佳截断值。
items.curatedReasonEn: When predicting independent walking at discharge for inpatient stroke rehabilitation, utilize the subtype-specific optimal cut-off values for the Berg Balance Scale (BBS). Ischemic and hemorrhagic stroke patients have different predictive scores, which will help you more accurately assess prognosis and set rehabilitation goals.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，可能存在数据收集和混杂因素控制方面的局限。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study, which may have limitations in data collection and control of confounding factors.

items.title: The psychosocial impacts of having eating and drinking difficulties after stroke: a qualitative evidence synthesis.
items.summary: A qualitative evidence synthesis of 22 studies (645 informants) identified two overarching domains—psychological and social impacts—of eating and drinking difficulties after stroke, affecting emotional well-being and social participation.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性证据合成揭示了卒中后吞咽和饮水困难对患者及其照护者的深远社会心理影响。这提醒你在处理这类患者时，不仅要关注生理康复，还要全面评估和支持他们的情绪健康和社会参与，制定更全面的康复计划。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽和饮水困难的社会心理影响：一项定性证据合成
items.summaryZh: 一项对 22 项研究（645 名受访者）的定性证据合成确定了卒中后吞咽和饮水困难对情绪健康和社会参与的两个主要影响领域——心理和社会影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative evidence synthesis reveals the profound psychosocial impacts of eating and drinking difficulties after stroke on patients and caregivers. This highlights the need for you to not only focus on physical rehabilitation but also comprehensively assess and support their emotional well-being and social participation when treating these patients, developing a more holistic rehabilitation plan.
items.limitation: 作为定性研究的综合，其结果具有解释性，但外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: As a synthesis of qualitative studies, the results are interpretive but have limited generalizability.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: An exploratory retrospective cohort study of 333 ACDF patients found sarcopenia to be a significant predictor for adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years of surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现肌少症会增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险。你在术前评估患者时，应将肌少症作为一个重要的危险因素纳入考虑，并可能需要在术前或术后早期进行干预。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后 3 年内邻近节段退变风险
items.summaryZh: 一项对 333 名颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术患者进行的探索性回顾性队列研究发现，肌少症是术后 3 年内邻近节段退变的重要预测因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that sarcopenia increases the risk of adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years following anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF). When assessing patients preoperatively, you should consider sarcopenia as a significant risk factor, and may need to implement interventions before or early after surgery.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，可能存在选择偏倚和数据完整性问题。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study, which may have selection bias and data completeness issues.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: A pragmatic quasi-experimental study found a 12-week exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) in 36 institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia significantly improved physical, psychological, and social outcomes compared to a control group.
items.curatedReason: 这项准实验研究表明，为期 12 周的体感游戏（exergaming）干预能为机构养老的肌少症老年人带来身体、心理和社交多方面益处。这是你在设计老年康复计划时值得考虑的创新干预手段，尤其是对于改善依从性和动机。
items.titleZh: 体感游戏对机构养老肌少症老年人多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结果
items.summaryZh: 一项务实的准实验研究发现，针对 36 名机构养老肌少症老年人的 12 周体感游戏干预（任天堂 Switch Ring Fit Adventure）与对照组相比，显著改善了身体、心理和社交结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This quasi-experimental study indicates that a 12-week exergaming intervention yields multi-domain benefits—physical, psychological, and social—for institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia. This is an innovative intervention you should consider when designing geriatric rehabilitation programs, especially for improving adherence and motivation.
items.limitation: 这是一项准实验研究，虽然有对照组，但非随机分配，可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a quasi-experimental study; although it included a comparison group, it was not randomized, which may introduce confounding factors.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Incidence of injury and illness at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games: post-pandemic trends and sport-specific risks
items.summary: A prospective surveillance study at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games monitored 4450 athletes over 14 days, reporting 535 injuries (incidence 8.6 per 1000 athlete days) and identifying taekwondo and football 5-a-side as high-risk sports.
items.curatedReason: 这份巴黎 2024 残奥会的损伤和疾病流行病学数据，提供了不同运动项目的特异性风险概览。它有助于你在残疾人运动员的预防、康复和表现训练中，更精准地识别高风险领域。
items.titleZh: 2024 巴黎残奥会损伤与疾病发生率：后疫情时代趋势与运动特异性风险
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 2024 巴黎残奥会的前瞻性监测研究在 14 天内监测了 4450 名运动员，报告了 535 例损伤（发生率为每 1000 运动员日 8.6 例），并确定跆拳道和五人制足球为高风险运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This epidemiological data on injuries and illnesses from the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games provides an overview of sport-specific risks. It helps you more precisely identify high-risk areas in the prevention, rehabilitation, and performance training of para-athletes.
items.limitation: 这是一项描述性研究，主要报告发生率，不涉及干预措施的有效性。
items.limitationEn: This was a descriptive study, primarily reporting incidences, and did not address the effectiveness of interventions.

items.title: GaitEncoder: A Foundation Model of Gait Kinematics for Diverse Clinical Applications and Pathologies
items.summary: GaitEncoder is a generative foundation model of walking kinematics that enables diverse downstream clinical tasks across various patient populations using clinically accessible smartphone video-based gait analysis, aggregated from eight gait datasets (6500+ participants).
items.curatedReason: GaitEncoder 模型是一个步态运动学基础模型，它通过智能手机视频分析，能为多种临床应用和病理学提供可操作的步态洞察。这预示着未来你可以在临床中利用更便捷的技术，进行量化步态分析以实现个性化治疗。
items.titleZh: GaitEncoder：一个用于多样化临床应用和病理学的步态运动学基础模型
items.summaryZh: GaitEncoder 是一个生成式步态运动学基础模型，它聚合了八个步态数据集（6500+ 名参与者），通过临床可用的智能手机视频步态分析，可支持多样化的下游临床任务和不同患者群体。
items.curatedReasonEn: The GaitEncoder model is a foundational model for gait kinematics that, through smartphone video analysis, can provide actionable gait insights for various clinical applications and pathologies. This indicates that in the future, you can leverage more convenient technology in clinical practice for quantitative gait analysis to achieve personalized treatment.
items.limitation: 目前是一个预印本研究，尚未经过同行评审。
items.limitationEn: This is currently a preprint study and has not yet undergone peer review.

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 36 studies (29 RCTs) on lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis, exploring their range, characteristics, and outcome measures, aiming to synthesize diverse approaches in exercise and weight management.
items.curatedReason: 这篇范围综述系统梳理了膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的现有证据，包括运动和体重管理。它为你在临床实践中评估和选择干预措施时，提供了干预类型和结果测量指标的概览，有助于优化患者的保守治疗策略。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的探索性范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了 36 项关于膝骨关节炎生活方式干预（包括运动和体重管理）的研究（其中 29 项为 RCT），旨在探索其范围、特征和结果测量指标，以综合不同方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically synthesizes the existing evidence on lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis, including exercise and weight management. It provides an overview of intervention types and outcome measures, which is crucial for you to evaluate and select conservative treatment strategies in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 该综述排除了非英文研究，可能存在语言偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The review excluded non-English studies, which may introduce language bias.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Physical therapy protocols for patients with a megaprosthesis after bone tumor resection.
items.summary: This study developed physical therapy protocols for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection, involving an explorative literature search and consensus procedures with orthopedic oncologic surgeons and physical therapists, piloted over one year.
items.curatedReason: 这份共识性物理治疗方案为骨肿瘤切除术后巨型假体患者的康复提供了循证指导。它涵盖了六种不同巨型假体的特定方案，你可以将其作为制定或优化这类复杂病例康复计划的起点。
items.titleZh: 骨肿瘤切除术后巨型假体患者的物理治疗方案
